plugins.name: agent-meeting
plugins.description: Cross-session meeting room for Claude Code agents. SQLite-backed: atomic writes, no race conditions, unlimited history. Sessions discover each other by name and hold persistent shared conversations.

plugins.name: init-agents
plugins.description: Initialize three project-level subagent profiles (explore/rd/planner) tiered by model cost. Replaces ad-hoc use of built-in Explore/Plan/general-purpose agents with a deliberate cheap→expensive cascade.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Session-end handoff cards with auto-pickup. Write a 50-line cue card at session end; next session's SessionStart hook auto-loads it and archives to docs/handoff/archive/. Zero re-typing needed to resume work.

plugins.name: save-money
plugins.description: Cost-control hooks for Claude Code sessions: auto-handoff when context nears window limit, truncate oversized tool text output, delegate main-agent image reads to an explore subagent, and delegate main-agent Edit/Write calls to a subagent. All gated by ~/.claude/cost-opt.json (written by the AMBridge PWA Save Money page).

plugins.name: init-proj
plugins.description: Scaffold a new project: create directory, three-tier subagent profiles (explore/rd/planner), git initial commit, and launch a director session. Project creation logic runs via the paid amp CLI; this skill is a thin shell that collects parameters and invokes it.
